born_under_an_unlucky_star.description: Didn't get a single correct letter in Wordle.

luck_of_the_draw.description: Won Wordle on the first guess.

quitter_boy.description: In the words of Mr. Thai from The Simpsons 'You quitter! Quitter boy, Quitter boy!'

green_day.description: I bet you don't feel like you're walking down a Boulevard of Broken Dreams because you solved Wordle with only greens.
